zh.lifeSummary: 當Gwladys ferch Dafydd Gam於大約1385年出生在威爾士布雷康史爾利安代福時，她的父親Dafydd Ap Gwilym28歲，母親Gwenlian Verch Phillip32歲。她於大約1407年與Sir Roger Vaughan Of Bredwardine在英國賀福爾布雷德沃迪結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1454年4月在威爾士蒙姆爾阿加文尼享年70歲，埋葬在威爾士蒙姆爾阿加文尼。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gwladys ferch Dafydd Gam于大约1385年出生在威尔士布雷康史爾利安代福时，她的父亲Dafydd Ap Gwilym28岁，母亲Gwenlian Verch Phillip32岁。她于大约1407年与Sir Roger Vaughan Of Bredwardine在英国賀福爾布雷德沃迪结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1454年4月在威尔士蒙姆爾阿加文尼享年70岁，埋葬在威尔士蒙姆爾阿加文尼。

nameMeanings.name: Gam
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Danish: possibly from a German noble name von Gamm from Mecklenburg (see Gamm ).
Indian (Karnataka): name of unexplained etymology found in the Koli people (a fishing community).

variants.name: Gamm
meanings: habitational name from Gamme, near Hamburg.
from a short form of an ancient Germanic personal name based on an element cognate with Old High German gaman ‘joy, fun, game’.

nameMeanings.name: Gwladys
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old form of   Gladys  , of uncertain derivation.

nameMeanings.name: ferch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

variants.name: Ferg
meanings: From the vocabulary word denoting the plant (Old English fearn). Modern use of this word as a given name dates from the 19th century, when it is also recorded occasionally as a boy's name in the United States. In some instances the given name may be a transferred use of the surname derived in the medieval period from the vocabulary word.

en.lifeSummary: When Gwladys ferch Dafydd Gam was born about 1385, in Llanddew, Breconshire, Wales, her father, Dafydd Ap Gwilym, was 28 and her mother, Gwenlian Verch Phillip, was 32. She married Sir Roger Vaughan Of Bredwardine about 1407, in Bredwardine, Herefordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 3 daughters. She died in April 1454, in Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Wales, at the age of 70, and was buried in Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Wales.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gwladys ferch Dafydd Gam est née environ 1385, à Llanddew, Breconshire, Galles, son père, Dafydd Ap Gwilym, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Gwenlian Verch Phillip, avait 32 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Roger Vaughan Of Bredwardine environ 1407, à Bredwardine, Herefordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en avril 1454, à Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Galles, à l’âge de 70 ans, et a été enterrée à Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Galles.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gwladys ferch Dafydd Gam um 1385 in Llanddew, Breconshire, Wales geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Dafydd Ap Gwilym 28 und ihre Mutter Gwenlian Verch Phillip 32. Sie hat um 1407 in Bredwardine, Herefordshire, England Sir Roger Vaughan Of Bredwardine geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb im April 1454 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Wales und wurde in Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Wales begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gwladys ferch Dafydd Gam è nata il circa 1385 nel Llanddew, Breconshire, Galles, sua padre, Dafydd Ap Gwilym, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Gwenlian Verch Phillip, aveva 32 anni. Lei sposato Sir Roger Vaughan Of Bredwardine circa 1407, nel Bredwardine, Herefordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel aprile 1454, nel Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Galles, all'età di 70 anni, e fu sepolta a Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Galles.

ja.lifeSummary: Gwladys ferch Dafydd Gamが約1385年にウェールズブレコンシュアイアランッドエウで生まれた時，父Dafydd Ap Gwilymは28歳，母Gwenlian Verch Phillipは32歳であった。約1407年にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアブレドワーディンでSir Roger Vaughan Of Bredwardineと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1454年4月にウェールズモンモウスシュアイアアバーガベニーで70歳で死去し，ウェールズモンモウスシュアイアアバーガベニーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Gwladys ferch Dafydd Gam(이)가 대략 1385년 웨일스 브레콘실르 랜듀에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Dafydd Ap Gwilym(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Gwenlian Verch Phillip(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 대략 1407년 영국 허퍼드실르 브레드워딘에서 Sir Roger Vaughan Of Bredwardine(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1454년 4월 웨일스 몬모우스실르 압르가븐이에서 70세의 나이로 사망했으며 웨일스 몬모우스실르 압르가븐이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gwladys ferch Dafydd Gam nasceu aproximadamente 1385, em Llanddew, Breconshire, Gales, seu pai, Dafydd Ap Gwilym, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Gwenlian Verch Phillip, tinha 32 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Roger Vaughan Of Bredwardine aproximadamente 1407, em Bredwardine, Herefordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em abril de 1454, em Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Gales, com 70 anos, e foi sepultada em Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Gales.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gwladys ferch Dafydd Gam родилась около 1385 г. в местности лланддю, брекуншир, Уэльс, её отцу по имени Dafydd Ap Gwilym было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Gwenlian Verch Phillip, 32. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Roger Vaughan Of Bredwardine около 1407 г. в местности бредвардаин, хирефордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла апрель 1454 г. в местности абиргавенни, монмоутшир, Уэльс в возрасте 70 лет и была похоронена в местности абиргавенни, монмоутшир, Уэльс.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gwladys ferch Dafydd Gam nació aproximadamente 1385, en Llanddew, Breconshire, Gales, su papá, Dafydd Ap Gwilym, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Gwenlian Verch Phillip, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Sir Roger Vaughan Of Bredwardine aproximadamente 1407, en Bredwardine, Herefordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en abril de 1454, en Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Gales, a la edad de 70 años, y fue sepultada en Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Gales.
